title: Java Software Engineer (Microservices)
description: Meridian Bank is modernising its core banking platform, breaking a 20-year-old monolith into cloud-native microservices. You'll join the Core Banking Platform team and build Java services that process millions of transactions daily, with strict regulatory requirements.
responsibilities: Develop new microservices for account management and payments domain
Participate in event-storming and DDD workshops with business analysts
Write unit and integration tests to 80%+ coverage
Ensure solutions comply with PCI-DSS and FCA regulatory requirements
